summary: GET /api/v1/analytics/churn returns 200 with empty body when DEMO_TENANT_ID is unset; UI shows infinite spinner.
poCheckpoint: Feature brief / spike ADR: N/A bugfix | UAC: 1 | gate Y | friction N/A | phase ADR: 0001
impact: Demo analytics page unusable for contributors following README quickstart only.

steps: Clone repo; copy .env.example to .env; omit DEMO_TENANT_ID.
Open /analytics; observe empty churn response and hung spinner.

expectedVsActual.expected: Explicit error or empty-state message; or documented DEMO_TENANT_ID requirement.
expectedVsActual.actual: Silent empty payload; client spinner hangs.

delegatedTaskPlan.intent: Builder fix handler + UI empty state

failureArtifacts.logsExcerpt: No server exception; handler returns early when tenant scope missing.

humanReadableOriginal: I followed the readme and the analytics dashboard just spins forever. No error.
advocateNotes: Reproduced without DEMO_TENANT_ID. Return 4xx JSON envelope or document env requirement.
